goal: Add a simple in-memory rate limiter to backend/server.py. Limit each IP to 60 requests per minute. Requests over the limit should return HTTP 429 with JSON body {"error": "Rate limit exceeded", "status": 429}. Add tests that verify a 429 is returned after exceeding the limit and that requests within the limit succeed.
acceptance_criteria: Requests over 60/min from same IP return HTTP 429
429 response body is JSON with error and status fields
